title: Help and Advice - Gill Furniss MP
headings: h3: Below is a list of organisations that you may also wish to get in touch with to offer you some assistance. Please be aware the buttons link to external websites.
text_excerpt: Help and Advice - Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu Help and Advice My team and I will always help where we can, but I have around 70,000 constituents as well as my Parliamentary duties to attend to. I have plenty of information below for you to look through to see if another organisation may be more appropriate to help with your issue. There is a strict parliamentary protocol which mean MPs can only help people who live in their constituency. If you are unsure who your MP is, you can find out here . If you have a personal issue (e.g. with immigration or benefits) and you live in Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough, I may be able to offer you help. Click the following links to see how I can help with different issues: Benefits Education Employment Health and social care Housing Immigration Legal matters Council matters Policy and legislation Below is a list of organisations that you may also wish to get in touch with to offer you some assistance. Please be aware the buttons link to external websites. Parliament - Find your MP Sheffield City Council Sheffield City Region Mayor South Yorkshire Police Sheffield Citizens Advice Money Advice Service Shelter Samaritans Sheffield Domestic Abuse Helpline Assist Sheffield (Asylum Support) Gill Furniss MP Contact details Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA '> View on Google Maps Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough Labour Party on behalf of Gill Furniss MP, both at Sheffield Labour Party, C/O Trades and Labour Club, Talbot Street, Sheffield, S2 2TG. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
